prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 47.9 kg; Height 152.2 cm; BMI 20.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 245mg/dL; 9 months ago 221mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.7kg; 9 months ago 47.2kg; 6 months ago 45.3kg; 3 months ago 46.7kg; current 47.9kg), Height (12 months ago 152.2cm; 9 months ago 152.2cm; 6 months ago 152.2cm; 3 months ago 152.2cm; current 152.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 13mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 308mg/g; 9 months ago 438mg/g; 6 months ago 323mg/g; 3 months ago 423mg/g; current 344mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 160mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.82 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
